complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Bootstrap pnpm Workspace and Development Environment
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the workspace setup into discrete configuration steps: create root package.json with workspace config, setup dev-container with specific tools, configure TypeScript/Vitest/Turbo, add pnpm overrides, create directory structure, and setup environment variables.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to multiple interdependent configurations (pnpm workspaces, dev-container, tooling) that form the foundation for all other work. Requires coordinating various technologies and ensuring compatibility.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement Schema Package with Zod Definitions
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into focused schema creation tasks: setup package structure and config, define core IdeaNode schema with Zod, create edge and graph type definitions, and configure build/export system with TypeScript generation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity involving TypeScript type system, Zod schema validation, and build configuration. Well-defined scope but requires careful type design that affects all downstream packages.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Develop Ops Package with Graph Algorithms
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Separate algorithm implementation: setup package structure, implement BFS traversal algorithm, implement Interwingle algorithm, create functional graph utilities (queries/filters/transformations), and ensure immutable API design.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High-medium complexity due to algorithm implementation requiring graph theory knowledge, functional programming patterns, and performance considerations. Critical for system functionality.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Build Store Package with Zustand State Management
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Structure the migration: setup Zustand package structure, design slice architecture replacing monolithic reducer, implement typed actions and RendererCommand system, create state selectors and graph manipulation actions, and remove legacy coupling dependencies.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High-medium complexity involving architectural migration from existing system to new state management. Requires careful design to maintain type safety and performance while breaking existing dependencies.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Create Canvas Package React-Three Renderer Facade
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the rendering system: setup Canvas package structure, abstract react-three-fiber/r3f-forcegraph behind facade, implement RendererCommand consumption system, create React Canvas component, optimize for 60 FPS performance with 1k nodes, and implement accessibility features for WCAG compliance.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity combining 3D graphics, React integration, performance optimization, and accessibility. Critical performance requirements (60 FPS with 1k nodes) add significant technical challenge.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement Input Hub for Multimodal Control
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Decompose multimodal integration: setup Input package structure, integrate Mediapipe Vision for hand gesture recognition, integrate Eleven Labs voice processing, create unified intent bus system, implement gesture-to-intent mapping, implement voice-to-intent mapping, and create multimodal input coordination system.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Very high complexity involving multiple external APIs (Mediapipe, Eleven Labs), real-time processing, and coordination between different input modalities. Requires handling WebAssembly assets and complex event coordination.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Set up GitHub Actions CI Pipeline
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Structure CI setup: create basic workflow configuration with Node 20 and ubuntu-latest, implement build and test job steps with pnpm commands, configure coverage reporting and quality gates, and setup caching and branch protection rules.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity for standard CI setup. Well-defined requirements but needs coordination with workspace structure and coverage requirements across multiple packages.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Structure the demo application: setup React app structure and dependencies, implement test data loading and 1k-node dataset generation, integrate Canvas component with performance monitoring, and implement feature flags for FPS degradation on low-end hardware.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity focusing on integration and performance demonstration. Depends on many other packages being complete but has clear success criteria (60 FPS with 1k nodes).

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Organize widget development: setup Widgets package structure, create core graph interaction components (overlay controls, navigation), implement accessibility features with ARIA labels and keyboard support, and design theming system for external integrators.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity involving React component development with accessibility requirements. Well-scoped UI work but requires careful accessibility implementation and theming architecture.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Generate Documentation and Achieve Coverage Targets
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Structure documentation work: configure TypeDoc for API documentation generation, implement comprehensive test coverage to achieve ≥80% targets for Schema and Ops packages, create package README files with usage examples, and setup documentation website with CI integration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity involving tooling configuration and content creation. Straightforward technical requirements but requires comprehensive coverage of all packages and coordination with CI pipeline.
